hero.lead: Six agents read the document, probe for critical incidents, score evidence, and surface mechanisms with provenance — not soft-skills clichés.
hero.small_html: Built on the architecture described in arch.md. Real-time observability for every stage.

form.hint: Uses DeepSeek via the Anthropic-compatible endpoint. ~18 LLM calls per 6-turn run.

report.empty: No mechanisms reached the publish threshold in this run. See the "needs more evidence" count above and consider raising turns.

about.card1.title: Hypotheses, not labels
about.card1.body: The intake agent reads the resume, identifies high-decision-density experiences, and proposes 2–5 hypothesis mechanisms — each tagged as "to be probed".
about.card2.title: Critical-incident probing
about.card2.body: One question per turn, always rooted in a specific incident. Cues → constraints → judgment → tradeoffs → actions → verification. The interviewer rotates hypotheses to spread coverage.
about.card3.title: Evidence before naming
about.card3.body: Every mechanism needs ≥2 distinct evidence cards, ≥1 from interview, and survives a skeptic that downgrades on overclaim, causal leaps, or missing anti-evidence.
